description: The U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) granted approval to ibrutinib for the treatment of adult patients with chronic lymphocytic leukemia (CLL) / Small lymphocytic lymphoma (SLL) with a 17p deletion.

contributions.description: On 2018-02-16 the FDA granted approval to ibrutinib for the treatment of adult patients with chronic lymphocytic leukemia (CLL) / Small lymphocytic lymphoma (SLL) with 17p deletion.
